poison_apply: Poisonous Axe randomly grants Mega Poison or Lethal Poison
Belle of the Ball grants Lethal Poison and Mega Poison
poison_synergy: Poisonous Axe increases damage when any enemy is poisoned
Budding Gifts changes behavior based on poisoned enemies
heal: Budding Gifts heals all non-burning allies for 500% of user's attack
tu_manip: Budding Gifts can reduce allied skill TU costs by 30% when 2 or more enemies are poisoned
enrage_apply: Budding Gifts grants Enraged to non-burning allies
token: BeastRegular01 is linked as Beauty & Beast's summoned/paired monster
spirit_gain: Poisonous Axe and Budding Gifts generate spirit
